titulo: Vídeo 59: Polimento de Comandos (Latência e Precisão)

cenas.dalle_prompt: A split screen. On the left, a dog takes 3 seconds to sit after the command. A timer graphic shows "3.2s". On the right, a dog sits instantly. The timer shows "0.5s". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The timers animate, clearly showing the difference in response time (latency). The right side gets a green checkmark.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A trainer gives the command "Senta". The dog immediately snaps into a perfect, crisp sit position. The trainer gives a very high-value reward (a piece of chicken). 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A slow-motion shot of the dog snapping into the sit, emphasizing the speed and precision. A sparkle effect highlights the high-value reward.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is in a "Junto" (heel) position, but it is slightly crooked. A graphic overlay shows a red, crooked line. The trainer resets the dog. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The red line graphic highlights the imperfection.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Now, the dog is in a perfect, straight "Junto" position, perfectly aligned with the owner. A graphic overlay shows a green, straight line. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The green line graphic highlights the perfect precision. A "Jackpot!" animation celebrates the improvement.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog performing commands with the precision and speed of a professional competition dog. Text overlay: "Do Bom ao Brilhante: A Arte do Polimento". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A cinematic montage of flawless, high-speed commands. The text appears in a sharp, elegant, professional font.
